findings.location: s6 (UI開発基盤（標準プラグイン）の変更点)
findings.description: The source's 標準プラグイン sheet contains a cumulative history of UI plugin changes spanning versions 1.4.2, Nablarch 5, 5u6, 5u10, 5u13, 5u14, 5u15, and 5u18 — dozens of entries covering specific bug fixes, jQuery upgrades, plugin version numbers, and usage notes. None of this historical data is captured in s6, which only includes the single 5u19 jQuery 3.5.1 entry. Users upgrading from older versions depend on this cumulative list, and the sheet explicitly instructs: 「アップデートする場合は、対象のバージョンから今回のバージョンまでのリリースノートの「UI開発基盤（標準プラグイン）の変更点」を全て確認してバージョンアップを実施してください」
findings.source_evidence: 標準プラグインの変更点 sheet: rows for 変更実施バージョン=1.4.2 (No.1-5), 5 (No.1-2), 5u6 (No.1-4), 5u10 (No.1-8), 5u13 (No.1-4), 5u14 (No.1-33), 5u15 (No.1), 5u18 (No.1) — all absent from knowledge file

findings.description: The source explicitly states 「なおNablarchでは、jackson-databindの脆弱性に繋がる機能は使用していません」, which is important for risk assessment. An AI answering 'Is our Nablarch application affected by this vulnerability?' would give an incomplete answer without this information. The knowledge file omits this note entirely.
findings.source_evidence: 5u19 main sheet, No.10 概要欄: 「なおNablarchでは、jackson-databindの脆弱性に繋がる機能は使用していません。」

findings.location: s1, No.9 (稼働環境テスト環境更新)
findings.description: The knowledge file mentions only DB and some app servers (Oracle 19c, Db2 11.5, SQL Server 2019, PostgreSQL 13.2, WildFly 23, Tomcat 9.0.24) but omits Oracle WebLogic Server 12.2.1.3 and WebSphere Application Server 9.0.5 from the updated app server list.
findings.source_evidence: 5u19 main sheet, No.9 概要欄: アプリケーションサーバ一覧に「Oracle Weblogic Server 12.2.1.3」「WebSphere Application Server 9.0.5」が明示されている

findings.description: Several module names present in s1 content are absent from the hints array: nablarch-testing-rest (No.10, No.14), nablarch-etl (No.10), sql-executor (No.14), nablarch-batch-ee (No.11). These are searchable artifact names users would use when looking up which modules were updated.
findings.source_evidence: 5u19 main sheet, No.10 修正後のバージョン列: 「nablarch-testing-rest 1.0.1」「nablarch-etl 1.2.4」; No.14: 「sql-executor 1.3.0」「nablarch-testing-rest 1.0.1」; No.11: 「nablarch-batch-ee 5u19」
